description: A large crowd of villagers gathers outdoors beneath broad green trees dappled with warm sunlight. Men and women wear traditional Galician folk dress: women in white blouses, coloured skirts, and red kerchiefs; men in dark jackets and caps. At the centre a musician appears to play an instrument while people press together in animated conversation and celebration. Children are visible in the foreground, their red and golden hair catching the light. The palette is dominated by vivid oranges, reds, whites, and greens rendered with bold, luminous brushwork.
